item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision - American Society for Quality
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how AI and Machine Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy. Learn how AI pipelines achieve unmatched precision with minimal latency.

item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar - AeroMegh
item.description: Join us for this exclusive webinar where we'll demonstrate how AeroMegh's advanced GeoAI platform revolutionizes power line inspection and maintenance. Discover how AI-powered drone technology can dramatically improve grid reliability while reducing operational costs.

item.title: How AI is transforming Machine Vision I 1st webinar of series - SICK
item.description: Powered by AI deep-learning technology, SICK Nova offers both on-device and cloud-based tools for complex defect detection, sorting and counting as well as classification tasks. By teaching the vision sensor using examples instead of manually setting up rules, users can quickly solve even complex applications with ease.

item.title: A3 Webinar: AI-Powered Vision Inspection in Manufacturing
item.description: Free webinar from the Association for Advancing Automation exploring how AI-driven machine vision systems are transforming quality inspection on the factory floor. Covers deep learning defect detection, real-time visual feedback loops, and integration with robotic pick-and-place systems.

item.title: Anomaly Detection with Crosser's Low Code Platform
item.description: In this webinar, Crosser CTO Göran Appelquist (Ph.D.) will show you how a modern edge analytics platform is used to design, deploy and maintain edge IoT use cases in a centralized way. Topics include examples of anomalies and how these can be detected using streaming analytics; How the Crosser Edge Analytics solution simplifies the i

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.

item.title: Webinar February 2026 | Enterprise Exclusive - Hammer Missions
item.description: This webinar explores how AI is being applied to real-world building envelope assessments , from automated defect detection to faster reporting and more consistent condition analysis. We'll focus on practical workflows, current limitations, and where AI genuinely adds value for engineers, surveyors, and inspection teams today.
